folio.label: 183r
folio.l: And by force , wan Tovnes stronge , and Toures
Shal on hire hed now , were a vitrymyte
And she æ bar the Ceptre , ful of floures
Shal bere a distaf , hire cost for to quyte
¢ Al thougú tha Nero , were vicious
As any fend , æ litú ful lowe a doun~
ñet he , as telletú vs , Swetoneus
This wilde world , had in subieccou~
Bothe Est and West , Nortú & semptriou~
Of Rubies Saphires , & of Perles white
Were alle hise clothes breided , vp & doun~
For he in ge~mes , gretly gan delite
¢ More delicat , more pompous of array
More proud , was neuäe Em¹oå , than he
That ilke clotú , æ he had wered oo day
After æ tyme , he nolde it neuäe see
Nettes of gold thred , had he gret plentee
To fisshe in Tybre , whan hi~ liste pleye
Hise lustes were as lawe , in his degree
For fortune as his frend , hi~ wolde obeye
¢ HH He Rome Brende , for his delicasie
The Senatours he slew , vp on a day
To here how æ men , wolde wepe & crye
And slow his brother , & by his Suster lay
His Moder mad he , in pitous array
For he hire wombe slitte , to be holde
Where he conceyued was , so weylaway
That he so litel , of his moder tolde
¢ No tere , ou©t of his eyen , for æat sigúte
Ne com , but seide , a fair wo~man was she
Gret wonder is , how æ he coude or mygúte
Be domesman , of hire dede beaute
The wyn to bryngen hi~ , comaunded he
And drank a noon , non oæä woo he made
Whan mygút is ioyned , vn to crueltee

note.notetxt: 407 There is a No beside the paragraph mark in the left margin.Est

folio.l: Allas to depe , wol the venym wade
¢ In ©outhe , a maister , had this Em¹our
To teche hi~ lettrure , and curteisie
For of moralitee , he was the flour
As in his tyme , but if bookes lye
And whil this maister , had of hi~ maistée
He maked hi so konnynge , & so souple
That longe tyme it was , æ or tyra~nye
Or any vice durste , in hi~ vncouple
